name: an acquisition that falls short of the floor reports sufficiency=below-threshold rather than passing silently
command: ID=P562S02; bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/acquire-technology-live.sh" --technology Vue --project $ID --cache fc --now 2026-07-05T00:00:00Z 2>e.err; rm -rf "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/generated-code-quality-standards"/_project/$ID; grep -qE 'sufficiency=below-threshold-30' e.err && echo below-threshold-honest 1>&2
setup: mkdir -p fc && printf 'Sanitize Vue v-html.\n' > fc/typescript-handbook.txt
